name: Citizens Deposit Bank Of Arlington, Inc.
description_short: Community bank serving Western Kentucky since 1949, offering checking, savings, loans, and business services with a focus on local reinvestment and personalized customer relationships.
description_long:
Citizens Deposit Bank of Arlington, Inc. has been operating as a community bank in Western Kentucky for 75 years, having been established in 1949. The bank primarily serves Carlisle, Ballard, and Hickman counties, positioning itself as a local institution where customers' money stays within the community and is reinvested locally.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of consumer and business banking products. On the consumer side, these include checking and savings accounts, car loans, home loans, and credit cards. They provide online banking and a mobile app for account access, and offer a Spirit Debit Card program that donates to local schools with each transaction. For business customers, CDB provides business checking, business savings, business loans, commercial loans, real estate loans, business credit cards, and merchant card services.

Citizens Deposit Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on personal relationships and local community focus. Their marketing explicitly highlights that customers receive "caring, dependable banking" from people who know them personally, with multiple customer testimonials praising the friendly and family-like service. The bank emphasizes being a "hometown bank" with competitive loan rates and local decision-making, contrasting itself with larger regional or national banks.

As a traditional community bank, CDB serves its stated geographic area well, but its reach is inherently limited to Western Kentucky counties. The website provides basic information about services and contact methods, though detailed product specifications, rates, and fee schedules are not publicly available online. For consumers in their service area seeking personal banking relationships with local institutions, CDB presents a viable option; those outside the three-county service area would need to look elsewhere.
pros: 75-year history of local operation (since 1949) providing stability and community trust
Mobile app and online banking available for account management and convenience
Spirit Debit Card program that donates to local schools with customer transactions
Competitive loan rates promoted as an advantage over larger banks
Business lending services including commercial, real estate, and merchant card processing
Money reinvested locally rather than to distant corporate headquarters
Personal relationship banking model with staff who know customers by name
cons: Limited geographic service area (only Carlisle, Ballard, and Hickman counties in Kentucky)
Specific rates, fees, and product details not transparently published on website
No mention of FDIC insurance details or deposit protection limits
Limited online functionality described; full range of digital banking features unclear
Smaller institution may have fewer branch locations and ATM networks compared to regional banks
best_for: Residents of Carlisle, Ballard, and Hickman counties in Western Kentucky seeking relationship-based banking
Small business owners and farms in the service area needing commercial lending and business checking
Customers prioritizing local community impact and money reinvestment in their region
Consumers who value personalized service and knowing their bankers personally
diagnosis: Citizens Deposit Bank is best for customers in its three-county Western Kentucky service area who prioritize personal relationships with their bank and want their deposits reinvested locally. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank only serves specific Kentucky counties, making it inaccessible to consumers outside this region, and detailed product information and rates are not available online.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community bank serving Western Kentucky since 1949 with checking, savings, loans, and personalized banking services.
fdic_official_name: Citizens Deposit Bank of Arlington, Inc.
